items.briefing:
Ransomware threats are escalating, with new research showing AI is helping cybercriminals launch attacks faster than ever, leaving organisations less time to respond before damage occurs. A ransomware group called Inc has also been exploiting unpatched vulnerabilities in SonicWall remote access devices — if your organisation uses SonicWall equipment, ensure it is updated immediately. Separately, a new report found 79% of organisations have been hit by incidents involving known, unpatched vulnerabilities, highlighting that keeping software up to date remains one of the most critical defences.

**Practical tip:** Check with your IT team that all internet-facing devices and software are current with security patches — known vulnerabilities are still the most common way attackers get in.

featured.title: DigiCert survey finds 81% of Australian organisations hit by AI security incidents or vulnerabilities
featured.quote: 81% of Australian organisations already experiencing AI security incidents signals urgent need for defensive strategy.
